prevalence.value: 0.5-1% of adults (higher with chronic lung disease)

burden.dalyPerCapita: high in advanced disease; right heart failure burden
burden.mortalityRate: Moderate to high in advanced cases

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Echocardiography screening; confirm with right heart catheterization when available

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low; access to PH centers is limited

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Echo access varies; right heart catheterization limited
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Treat underlying cause; PAH therapy with PDE5 inhibitors/endothelin antagonists when available
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Delayed diagnosis, cost barriers, and limited specialized centers
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Availability of low-cost sildenafil and expanding cardiopulmonary services
